positive: A majestic, abstract representation of a stylized forest silhouette under a cosmic night sky. The scene features towering, elegant trees with exaggerated, graceful branches, forming a dynamic, negative-space pattern. The foreground should be filled with stylized geometric elements like glowing orbs and crystalline undergrowth. The sky transitions from deep indigo to vibrant nebula purples and teal, dotted with stylized constellations and a crescent moon. The overall style should be highly detailed, vector-graphic quality, with thick, clean black silhouettes against a bioluminescent, gradient cosmic backdrop. Focus on strong contrast and symmetrical balance, suitable for a central apparel print. Perfect composition, high contrast, clean lines, maximal detail, mystical, dreamlike.
negative: blur, artifact, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grainy, messy, poor contrast, photorealistic, gradient artifact, noise, cartoon, childish, ugly
